tax_filing.title: Monthly provisional + annual return to SAT
tax_filing.summary: Monthly provisional payments + annual ISR return.

vat_gst.title: Mexican IVA — 16% with withholding
vat_gst.summary: 16% IVA; specific withholding requirements for digital services and platforms.

e_invoicing.title: CFDI 4.0 mandatory via PAC
e_invoicing.summary: All electronic invoices in CFDI 4.0 format stamped through certified PAC; clearance model since 2014.

e_invoicing.title: Carta Porte 3.1 supplement
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory transport supplement (Carta Porte) with detailed logistics data.

payroll.title: Nómina CFDI digital payroll receipts
payroll.summary: Employers must issue payroll CFDI receipts stamped through PAC.

payroll.title: IMSS (~24%) + Infonavit (5%)
payroll.summary: HIGH complexity: IMSS social security ~24% + Infonavit 5% + state payroll tax.

local_gaap.title: NIF (Mexican Financial Reporting Standards)
local_gaap.summary: NIF converging with IFRS; mandatory for non-listed entities.

banking_payments.title: SPEI real-time + CoDi mobile
banking_payments.summary: SPEI for real-time interbank; CoDi for mobile QR payments.
